description: Coldlytics is an on-demand B2B contact list service combining automation, AI, and human researchers to build verified, niche-specific prospect lists for agencies.
tagline: B2B contact lists researched on demand
overview: Coldlytics provides agencies and small businesses with targeted B2B contact lists built on demand by a combination of automation, AI, and human researchers. It identifies key decision-makers and their verified contact details within 24 hours, backed by a bounce-back refund policy.
what_is: Coldlytics is a lead generation service built for agencies and businesses that need targeted, verified contact lists. It combines automation, AI, and human researchers to build accurate prospect lists from scratch rather than pulling from a static database. Plans include 25 free leads per month, with paid tiers offering up to 1,000 leads and rollover credits. Human-verified data and a bounce-back refund policy set it apart from fully automated alternatives.

Coldlytics is especially well suited to agencies and freelancers looking for fresh, niche-specific B2B leads in English-speaking markets such as the US, UK, Canada, and Australia. Once a search is submitted, custom lists are delivered within 24 hours, making it practical for ongoing outreach and quick campaign starts.

It fits into sales stacks as a data enrichment and prospecting input, supplying clean contact data to CRMs and email outreach tools. Because it is an on-demand research service rather than an instant-access database, it is not the right fit for bulk data scraping or situations requiring immediate results. Its advantage is data quality over raw volume.
